## Key Benefits of Gyeon Q²M Interior Detailer

- **Anti-Bacterial Formula** - Kills bacteria and germs while leaving surfaces clean
- **Safe to Use** -Suitable for leather, fabric, plastic, Alcantara, vinyl and media screens.
- **Finish** - A clean, factory fresh look without adding any unwanted shine or residue

- Gyeon Q²M Interior Detailer
A strong anti-bacterial cleaner suitable for use on all interior surfaces

## Description

Gyeon Q²M Interior Detailer is a Strong hygienic action while removing daily contaminants for a pure and clean surface.

These days keeping your surroundings clean has a completely new meaning and may decide about the health of you and your loved ones.

Q²M Interior Detailer has an alcohol-based formula (60%), which removes the majority of organic contaminants from any surface.

Q²M InteriorDetailer does not replace Q²M VinylCleaner or Q²M LeatherCleaner, but compliments them.

The ideal interior maintenance product, to remove light grime, contaminants and leave a fresh and purify interior feel.

It’s safe on leather, plastic, Alcantara, textiles, glass and all types of interior trim. It will leave a matte and not sticky finish.

## How to use Gyeon Q²M Interior Detailer

- Spray product directly onto the surface of the your looking to clean or onto the microfibre. 
- Use a brush or microfibre to wipe down the surface, followed by a second wipe of a dry microfibre.
